description: Combining sport, style and comfort, with an adidas logo emblazoned on the front, this Sports bag makes for a great buy.Height: 41.5cmWidth: 13cmDepth: 30cmMade of 100% polyester with a nylon lining for optimum performanceOne main zippered compartment with a laptop pouchOne zippered compartment on the front with red pipingUtility pocket on the front with organizing pouches and a mobile pouchMesh pockets on the sides for carrying sipper and essentialsPadded, branded and adjustable shoulder strapsSynthetic haul loop for handling easeCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dirt
